case_title: LY, LIEN SO VS WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $375.00 FILED BY LY, LIEN SO AS TO DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-19-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-04-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LY, LIEN SO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY $315.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $335.00, DEFT ALLOW $10 RENT AND $50 CLEANING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
